M1410_RESPTX_NONE M1410 (M0500) Resprtry Treat At Home- None This field indicates if the respiratory treatment utilized at home is none of the above. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x
M1410_RESPTX_OXYGN M1410 (M0500) Resprtry Treat At Home- Oxygen This field indicates if the respiratory treatment utilized at home is oxygen (intermittent or continuous). 0
